description: A supply chain director needs to understand what is driving sales performance. Using the data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, create a Power BI report named Sales_Decomposition.pbix saved to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\. The report model must include two DAX measures: Total_Sales (sum of Sales_Amount) and Avg_Order_Value (average of Sales_Amount). The report must contain a page titled 'Sales Drivers' with a Decomposition Tree visual (analyzing Total_Sales explained by Region, Product_Category, Customer_Type, and Sales_Channel) and a Multi-Row Card visual (displaying Total_Sales and Avg_Order_Value). Login as Docker.
